message: ci(mac): setup node and pnpm for web build

files.patch:
@@ -31,7 +31,16 @@ jobs:
         xcodebuild -version
         swift --version
     
-    # Node.js/pnpm not needed - web artifacts are downloaded
+    - name: Setup Node.js
+      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+      with:
+        node-version: '24'
+
+    - name: Setup pnpm
+      uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
+      with:
+        version: 10
+        run_install: false
     
     - name: Cache Homebrew packages
       uses: actions/cache@v4
